title: Cleanup: remove dead model.go Model monolith, migrate roadmap_test, relocate live helpers
description: Drift found at epic 682 final review: after the tk tui restructure, internal/tui/model.go (the old 1582-line Model monolith) is orphaned -- nothing in tk tui or any CLI command reaches it; only roadmap_test.go keeps it alive (it drives legacy Model to test the roadmap RENDERER). roadmap.go itself is NOT dead (roadmapView calls RenderRoadmapWithSelection/roadmapEpicOrder). model.go also still holds LIVE shared helpers/styles used by the new views, so it cannot be deleted wholesale. Plan: delete the dead Model cluster, migrate roadmap_test.go to drive roadmapView, relocate the live helpers/styles into render.go/styles_local.go. Tracked follow-up; not blocking the big-picture roadmap completion.
acceptance_criteria: dead Model/NewModel/viewMode/doApprove/doReject/jumpToRoadmapEpic/buildItems/apply*/keyMap removed from internal/tui/model.go; roadmap_test.go migrated onto roadmapView; still-live shared helpers (renderStatus/renderType/renderPriority/truncate/wrapAndIndent/splitRoots) + styles relocated to render.go/styles_local.go; go test ./internal/tui/... green
closed_reason: Completed: deleted dead model.go monolith (-1488 lines) + model_test; relocated live helpers to render.go/styles_local.go/watcher.go; migrated roadmap_test onto new views; net -1511 lines; build/vet/tests green
